arts.ttl: Man Utd fans criticise ticket prices - as club reveals manager change costs
arts.sum: Supporter groups accuse Manchester United of exploiting their fans after taking a mid-season decision to raise matchday ticket prices.

arts.ttl: Arsenal hit with DOUBLE transfer blow as Viktor Gyokeres 'has heart set' on Man Utd move
arts.sum: Arsenal have been linked with making a transfer move for both Alexander Isak and Viktor Gyokeres but Manchester United may have ensured the Gunners have a difficult time securing either

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim warns Marcus Rashford has to 'really want it' amid questions over form
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has vowed to help Marcus Rashford rediscover his best form, but stressed the player also has to "really, really want it".

arts.ttl: How Manchester United should line up vs Bodo/Glimt in Europa League fixture
arts.athr: newsdesk@men-news.co.uk (Samuel Luckhurst, Tyrone Marshall, George Smith)
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim will take charge of his first home game as Man United head coach when Bodo/Glimt visit Old Trafford in the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Man Utd Join Barcelona in Race for Napoli Stalwart
arts.sum: Premier League giants Manchester United have joined Barcelona in the race for unsettled Napoli superstar Khvicha Kvaratskhelia. According to Sport Mediaset via Sport, the Red Devils keep close tabs on the Georgian winger's contract wobble at Stadio Diego Armando Maradona. The post Man Utd Join Barcelona in Race for Napoli Stalwart appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.

arts.ttl: How to watch Manchester United vs Bodo/Glimt: TV channel and live stream for Europa League today
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim’s first home game in charge of Red Devils

arts.ttl: Thursday's Transfer Talk Update: Guglielmo Vicario, Fraser Forster, Rasmus Hojlund
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim names one of Manchester United's 'greatest weapons' in first programme notes
arts.sum: New Man United head coach Ruben Amorim has penned his first programme notes ahead of the visit of Bodo/Glimt.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca reveals stance on selling £53m Chelsea star to Man Utd amid transfer links
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca is struggling to keep all of the players in his bloated squad happy, with Manchester United one of the rivals circling over stars demanding more game time

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim told to swoop for same ex-Man United star Erik ten Hag 'wanted' before axe
arts.sum: Lee Sharpe believes Rasmus Hojlund is in need of support in the final third at Manchester United, and thinks that Ruben Amorim should turn to a familiar face in the January window
